verb לרעוש

to make a noise

verb נרעש

be shocked, agitated

verb להירעש

be shocked, agitated

verb להרעיש

be noisy; bombard

verb הורעש

be bombarded

masculine noun

noise, din, pandemonium, racket, rumpus, uproar, fracas, hullabaloo, ping, pother, row, ruckus, rumble, blare, boom, clamor, crash; earth quake; shake up, tumult
